understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by positioning each selectable piece onto corresponding goal tiles marked '+'. For levels with multiple goals, every goal had to be simultaneously occupied by a piece to trigger a WIN condition for that level, ultimately winning the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Pieces are selected and moved by CLICK actions to target positions [x, y], following pathfinding around obstacles and walls. Movement consumes steps from a finite per-level budget. Pieces can oscillate between positions if clicked alternately (e.g., [9,21] ↔ [18,21]). Repeated clicks on the current position may have no effect if blocked. No explicit pushing mechanics observed; selection is implicit on the active piece.

For levels with multiple goals, every goal had to be simultaneously occupied by a piece to trigger a WIN condition for that level, ultimately winning the entire game.

Movement consumes steps from a finite per-level budget. Pieces can oscillate between positions if clicked alternately (e.g., [9,21] ↔ [18,21]). Repeated clicks on the current position may have no effect if blocked. No explicit pushing mechanics observed; selection is implicit on the active piece.
